prompt: Extremely ultra-realistic photograph — indistinguishable from a real photograph by an award-winning documentary photographer. A beautiful radiant shaman healer named Gislaine is performing a sacred blessing (benzeção) on another person with fresh sacred herbs. Gislaine is the same exact woman from the reference images — reproduce her face with forensic photographic accuracy. She wears the same exact colorful handmade crocheted poncho with vivid rainbow V-shaped horizontal stripes — pink, hot pink, emerald green, blue, sky blue, golden yellow, red, crimson, purple, violet, and white — with multicolored crocheted tassels along the bottom edge, visible handmade crocheted open-stitch yarn texture. Same white wrapped turban with the golden braided band and turquoise-green oval gemstone at the forehead. Same cowrie shell bracelet on her wrist. THE BLESSING ACT: Gislaine stands behind and over the person. In her right hand she holds a thick abundant bundle of fresh green sacred herbs — rue (arruda), rosemary, guiné, basil — pressing and brushing the leaves gently against the top of the person's head in the traditional sweeping motion of a Brazilian benzeção. The fresh leaves are making direct contact with the person's hair. Her left hand rests lovingly on top of the person's head, palm down, channeling warm healing energy directly through her touch. GISLAINE'S EXPRESSION — THIS IS CRITICAL: Her face radiates warm loving spiritual energy and sacred joy. She has a gentle, peaceful, loving half-smile — the expression of a mother blessing her child with all the love in the universe. Her eyes are softly half-closed in deep spiritual connection, not squinting or frowning — gently, peacefully, lovingly focused. Her brow is relaxed and smooth, not furrowed. She looks like a woman who is GIVING the most precious gift — her healing energy — with absolute love, warmth, generosity and spiritual fulfillment. Blessing someone fills HER with joy too. She is centered, grounded, connected to Mother Earth, radiating pure love and sacred power through every pore. There is NO sadness, NO strain, NO suffering — only love, peace, spiritual warmth, and divine grace flowing through her. THE PERSON RECEIVING: A woman seen from a three-quarter angle, sitting peacefully. She has natural brown hair, wearing a simple white top. Her head is gently bowed, eyes closed in deep peaceful meditation, a subtle serene smile on her lips — she feels the healing energy flowing into her soul and it brings her peace. Her hands rest open on her lap, palms up, in total receptivity. She is deeply centered and at peace — you can feel her spiritual surrender. Her skin shows real texture — visible pores, natural details. ENERGY EFFECTS: Dramatic warm golden god rays of sunlight burst through the tropical foliage behind them, creating spectacular beams of divine light converging on both figures. From where Gislaine's hand and the sacred herbs touch the person's head, visible luminous golden and emerald-green energy radiates outward — sacred healing light flowing from the plants and from Gislaine's palm into the person's crown. Gentle golden particles and tiny luminous sparks float in the air around them, especially concentrated around the herbs and hands. A soft warm golden aura connects both figures — showing the sacred energetic bond between healer and receiver. A thin wisp of white smoke from burning sage rises nearby, catching the golden light beautifully. The tropical garden with palm fronds and lush green plants surrounds them like a natural temple. The energy effects are beautiful and visible but integrated naturally with the golden sunlight — divine but not cartoonish. Shot on Canon EOS R5, 85mm lens, f/1.8, ISO 200. Camera at eye level, three-quarter angle showing Gislaine's loving face and the person's peaceful bowed head. Shallow depth of field, both figures razor-sharp, garden dissolving into warm golden-green bokeh. This is the sacred heart of the Benção Sagrada do Cantuá — pure love made visible.
